event: A hound tracking a scent in a snowy field
description: A tricolor hound (black, white, and brown) with its head lowered, nose to the ground, tracking a scent across a partially snow-covered field. Patches of brown grass and dried vegetation show through the white snow. A dark line of evergreen forest fills the background. The dog wears a dark collar and moves with focused intent. The rendering is photorealistic with precise detail in the dog's fur, the texture of snow, and the grass.
